response.overview: You will get started by creating a skeleton application and you will add to it in each lab until you have built a full application that allows you to create and manage a personal list of movies you have watched or want to watch.  You will also need to sign up for an account on The Movie Database and obtain an API Key. A TMDB API Key is required for this tutorial, as authentication is needed to get data from The Movie Database API.
response.title: Movies Watchlist

results.name: Merlina: Temporada 3 | Anuncio del elenco | Netflix
